message:
refactor(cli): normalize triage dir and default assign strategy

- bv.go: Use normalizeTriageDir() instead of inline os.Getwd() fallback
  in GetBeadsSummary for consistent directory resolution.

- coordinator.go: Decouple assign strategy resolution from cobra flag
  state. Use explicit empty-string check instead of cmd.Flags().Changed()
  to determine if strategy needs defaulting. Apply config default, then
  fall back to DefaultAssignConfig().Strategy. Add explicit 30s default
  timeout when assignTimeout is zero.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
